name: Zircon 1
description: UV-resistant HDPE and PP safety helmet with an 8-point LDPE cradle, manual size adjustment, and accessory-ready side slots.
spec: Head size 53-63 cm; electrical insulation up to 1,000 V AC / 1,500 V DC; chin strap anchorage with 2 or 4 points; colors: white, grey, yellow, orange, red, green

name: Quartz Up III
description: UV-resistant PP safety helmet with a 3-textile-strap polyamide cradle, foam sweat band, and adjustable ROTOR fit system.
spec: Head size 53-63 cm; top/low headband positions; electrical insulation up to 1,000 V AC / 1,500 V DC; colors: white, blue, grey-yellow, black, orange, yellow, red, green

name: Quartz Up IV
description: Ventilated UV-resistant PP safety helmet with an 8-point polyamide textile cradle, foam sweat band, and adjustable ROTOR system.
spec: Head size 53-63 cm; high/low headband positions; EN397 / EN50365; colors: white, blue, yellow, orange, red, green

name: Granite Peak
description: ABS mountain-style safety helmet with a 3-point chin strap and adjustable ROTOR system for secure work-at-height protection.
spec: +50 C / -20 C; MM; 440 VAC; electrical insulation to EN50365

name: Harness Z
description: Pack of 10 spare harness sets designed as replacement suspension assemblies for Zircon safety helmets.
spec: Pack of 10 spare harnesses for Zircon helmets

name: Dynamic Jugalpha
description: Bag of 10 four-point chin straps compatible with Quartz, Zircon, and Baseball Diamond helmet ranges.
spec: Bag of 10 chin straps; 4 fixing points; fits Quartz, Zircon, and Baseball Diamond

name: Air Coltan
description: Impact-resistant baseball-style bump cap with strong ventilation, mesh comfort zones, and an EVA foam-reinforced inner shell.
spec: Adjustable size 55-62 cm; polyurethane-coated polyester exterior; HDPE inner shell with foam reinforcement; colors: navy blue-orange, grey-yellow, fluorescent yellow-grey, black-red

name: AMAZONE S5 SRA
description: PVC safety boot with injected PVC/nitrile outsole built for wet and demanding work environments.
spec: Upper: PVC; no lining; no insole; outsole: injected PVC/nitrile; size range: 36-47

name: DELTA SPORT S1P SRC
description: Non-metallic safety footwear with injected PU on mesh upper and nitrile rubber outsole in a sporty black-red build.
spec: Upper: injected PU on mesh; lining: polyester; removable premolded polyester on EVA insole; cemented phylon midsole; rubber nitrile outsole; color: black-red; size range: 39-47 EU

name: GARGAS3 EH
description: Breathable black electrical-hazard safety shoe with composite toe and anti-perforation protection.
spec: Polyamide mesh breathable lining; EVA-polyester footbed; PU 2D injection-molded outsole; composite anti-perforation insert; composite safety toe-cap; EH rated; color: black

name: MIAMI S2 SRC
description: Water-resistant microfiber safety shoe with easy-care construction and a removable EVA-based in-sock.
spec: Upper: microfiber/PU; removable premolded polyester on EVA in-sock; injected single-density PU midsole; machine washable up to 30 C

name: TW402 S3 SRC
description: Full-grain leather S3 safety footwear with water-resistant treatment, reinforced toe and heel, and Panoshock shock absorption.
spec: Full-grain leather upper; S3 water-resistant treatment; premolded front and back reinforcements; polyamide absorbing lining; removable premolded polyester on PU insole; cemented PU midsole with Panoshock shock absorber; rubber nitrile outsole; non-metallic; size range: 39-48

name: SAGA2 S3S SR
description: Nubuck leather S3S safety footwear with water-resistant treatment and a cemented PU/rubber outsole.
spec: Nubuck leather upper with S3 water-resistant treatment; polyester lining; removable polyester on EVA insole; cemented PU/rubber outsole; EN ISO 20344:2011; EN ISO 20345:2011; ASTM F 2413:2011

name: BRAVA2Soft
description: Lightweight safety glasses with flat spatula arms, side protection, and an integrated polycarbonate nose piece for easy use with helmets and ear defenders.
spec: Frame and lens: polycarbonate; integrated nose piece; weight: 25 g

name: MEIA
description: Single-lens polycarbonate glasses with integrated nose piece, polycarbonate arms, and non-slip PVC tips.
spec: Colors: clear, dark, or smoke; CE EN166 / EN170-172

name: ASO2
description: Sport-design polycarbonate glasses with flexible bi-material arms and a nose piece shaped for a wide range of users.
spec: Polycarbonate / TPR arms; anti-fog; anti-scratch

name: FUJI2
description: Twin-lens polycarbonate glasses with twin-material arms, soft tips, and a soft TPE nose piece for comfort.
spec: Twin polycarbonate lenses; soft TPE nose piece; also available with gradient lens

name: VULCANO2
description: Single-lens polycarbonate glasses with adjustable tilting nylon arms, spatula tips, and integrated TPE nose support.
spec: Side protections; EN166 / EN170 UV 2C-1.2; ANSI Z87.1; available in dark or clear

name: KILIMANDJARO
description: Indirect-ventilated polycarbonate goggles with a flexible PVC and nylon frame sized to fit over glasses and disposable half-mask respirators.
spec: Indirect ventilation; wide elastic strap; compatible with eyewear and disposable respiratory half-masks

name: GALERAS
description: Indirect-ventilated polycarbonate goggles with a flexible PVC and nylon frame designed to wear over glasses and disposable half-mask respirators.
spec: Indirect ventilation; wide elastic strap; compatible with eyewear and disposable respiratory half-masks

name: MURIA1
description: Clear polycarbonate goggles with a flexible PVC frame, direct ventilation, and a textile elastic headband.
spec: Clear polycarbonate monobloc lens; optical class 1; colorless PVC frame; PVC nose pad; vented eyebrow protection; weight: 60 g

name: CASOUD3
description: Black polypropylene welding goggle with lift-front lens holder, moisture resistance, and durable impact protection.
spec: Lens size: 108 x 51 mm (4.25 x 2 in); complies with CE EN175, ANSI Z87, and CSA Z94.3

name: VE702GR
description: 13-gauge polyamide knitted glove with polyurethane coating on the palm and fingertips for lightweight handling work.
spec: 100% polyamide support; polyurethane palm and fingertip coating; gauge 13; EN388:2016; EN420:2003+A1:2009

name: VE712GR
description: 13-gauge polyester glove with nitrile coating on the palm and fingertips in a grey-black finish.
spec: 100% polyester support; nitrile palm and fingertip coating; gauge 13; color: grey-black

name: VE726
description: 15-gauge polyamide and spandex knitted glove with nitrile and polyurethane palm coating for dexterity and grip.
spec: Grey-black; nitrile/polyurethane palm and fingertip coating; gauge 15; sizes 07/08/09/10; EN420:2003+A1:2009; EN388:2016

name: VE727
description: 15-gauge polyamide spandex glove with nitrile and polyurethane coating plus nitrile dots on the palm for extra grip.
spec: Grey-black; nitrile/polyurethane palm and fingertip coating; nitrile dots on palm; gauge 15; sizes 07/08/09/10; EN420:2003+A1:2009; EN388:2016

name: VECUTB04G3
description: ECONOCUT high-performance fiber glove with nitrile-coated palm and fingertips for cut-aware handling tasks.
spec: High performance fibre support; nitrile palm and fingertip coating; gauge 13; EN420:2003+A1:2009; EN388:2016; ANSI-ISEA 105:2016

name: FBN49
description: American-assembly cowhide full-grain leather glove built for durable mechanical protection.
spec: Cowhide full-grain leather; thickness 0.9-1.1 mm; sizes 07/08/09/10/11; EN388:2016+A1:2018

name: FCN29
description: Leather work glove with cowhide grain palm, full index, and split leather back in an American-assembly build.
spec: Cowhide grain leather palm; split leather back; palm and back thickness 0.9-1.1 mm; full index design

name: CA615K
description: Heat-resistant split cowhide glove with cotton fleece hand lining and canvas-lined cuff for welding and hot-work tasks.
spec: Length 35 cm; heat-resistant treated split cowhide leather 1.2-1.4 mm; batting hand lining; 300 g/m² cotton cuff lining; EN420:2003+A1:2009; EN388:2016; EN407:2004; EN12477

name: TERK400
description: Thermal aluminized leather glove for extreme-heat exposure in heavy-industry applications.
spec: Split cow leather construction; aramid-polyester lining; aluminized cuff; glove length 400 mm; cuff length 200 mm; elbow cuff protection; azo free

name: VE730
description: Single-coated latex glove with wrinkled grip-textured palm on a weft-yarn polyester support.
spec: Palm coating; single latex coating; wrinkled grip texture; polyester fiber support

name: TC716
description: Cow split-leather glove with leather palm and back for rugged general-purpose handling.
spec: Cow leather; split leather finish; leather support; split-leather palm and back

name: NITREX VE801
description: Single-coated nitrile glove with a smooth finish and flocked interior for chemical and maintenance work.
spec: Single nitrile coating; smooth finish; flocked inner finish

name: CHEMSAFE VV835
description: Triple-coated nitrile glove with a foam-rough grip texture for stronger hold in chemical-handling environments.
spec: Triple nitrile coating; grip-textured foam-rough finish

name: INTERLAGOS2
description: Over-the-head ear defenders with ABS cups, synthetic foam cushions, and a padded flexible headband with height adjustment.
spec: ABS cups; synthetic foam cushions; ABS over-the-head support; weight: 200 g

name: SUZUKA2
description: Helmet-mounted ear defenders with adjustable height, flexible ABS arms, and padded cups for use alone or with visor holders.
spec: ABS cups and arms; PVC and synthetic foam cushions; helmet-mounted support; suitable for GRANITE, SUPER QUARTZ, QUARTZ, ZIRCON, and BASEBALL DIAMOND helmets; weight: 252 g

name: SPA3
description: Lightweight ear defenders with low-pressure pads, adjustable ABS headband, and cushioned cups for everyday noise protection.
spec: Polystyrene and synthetic foam cups; PU foam cushions; ABS over-the-head support; weight: 155 g

name: CONIC2V200
description: Dispenser box of 200 pairs of PU foam earplugs for convenient high-volume hearing protection use.
spec: 200 pairs per dispenser box; PU foam earplugs; SNR 37 dB
